markets.question: Llaneros FC vs. CA Bucaramanga: O/U 3.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Colombia Primera A game between Llaneros FC and CA Bucaramanga, scheduled for January 24 at 4:10 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Llaneros FC and CA Bucaramanga combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on dimayor.com.co. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

In the upcoming Chile Primera División game between CD Concepción and O'Higgins FC, scheduled for February 1 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if CD Concepción and O'Higgins FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.
